title: Market Data
subtitle: Real-time & Snapshots
description: Monitor live equity, derivatives, and debt markets. Analyze order book depth, price ticks, and real-time volume snapshots. WebSocket high-frequency order book logs, bond yields, call money rates, and top gainers/losers.

title: Corporate Disclosures & Filings
subtitle: SEBI Filings & Board Meetings
description: Track statutory filings, board meetings, insider trading reports, and corporate actions. Access clean structured disclosures, Shareholding Patterns, and promoters details in real-time.

title: Derivatives & Segment-Specific Data
subtitle: F&O Option Chains & Roll-overs
description: Deep dive into Equity, Currency, and Commodity derivatives. Review Open Interest (OI) distribution, PCR ratio, yield-to-maturity tracking, and rollover analytics.

title: Historical & Analytical Data
subtitle: Bhavcopy & Turnover Trends
description: Load historical daily and monthly bhavcopy and analyze traded volumes, close prices, and turnover metrics. Includes the Turnover Assessment dashboard and AMFI category/industry classification filters.

title: Turnover Assessment Dashboard
subtitle: Equity Delivery & Traded Volume Analysis
description: Analyze equity delivery turnover, daily and monthly volume trends, percentage delivery across stocks. Filter by cap sizes, delivery ranges, and export CSV/Excel reports.
details: Excel & CSV data exporting and downloads

title: Institutional & Participant Activity
subtitle: FII, FPI & DII Flows
description: Monitor FII/FPI net transactions, mutual fund (DII) flows, and client category trading volume. Keep tabs on institutional market sentiment and retail/HNI/NRI volume shares.

title: Regulatory, Compliance & Educational Data
subtitle: SEBI Mandates & Investor Resources
description: Access SEBI regulations, listing compliance reports, and investor education resources. Ensure adherence to exchange guidelines, bylaws, circuit margins, and grievance procedures.
